app.name: JavBus API Proxy
app.one_liner: A self-hosted, stateless API service that scrapes and transforms JavBus website content into structured JSON endpoints in real time.

screens.name: API Endpoints Overview
screens.purpose: Display available REST-like endpoints for movies, stars, and magnets with usage examples.

rust_commands.name: fetch_magnets
rust_commands.purpose: Scrape and return magnet links associated with a given movie ID from JavBus.

rust_commands.name: fetch_movie_detail
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch detailed movie information including metadata and cover image by parsing JavBus detail page.

rust_commands.name: fetch_movie_list
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve paginated list of movies from JavBus by scraping and transforming HTML to JSON.

rust_commands.name: fetch_star_detail
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve actor/actress profile and filmography by parsing JavBus star page.

rust_commands.name: search_movies
rust_commands.purpose: Search movies by keyword or ID via real-time scraping of JavBus search results.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add Docker deployment support with documented image
week 1: Implement core scraping logic for movie list endpoint
week 1: Integrate basic authentication via token or username/password
acceptance_tests: Deployment via Docker runs successfully on non-US IP and serves API on port 3000.
Fetching magnets for a valid movie ID returns at least one magnet link.
Searching by movie ID returns structured detail including cover image URL.
The /api/movies endpoint returns a non-empty list of movies when JavBus is accessible and not blocked.
Vercel deployment completes without 500 errors and routes /api requests correctly.
